flashcards.back: "Is less than". The smaller number goes on the left side of the symbol.
"Is greater than". The larger number goes on the left side of the symbol.

flashcards.front: When comparing two numbers with different number of digits, which is usually larger?
flashcards.back: The number with more digits is usually larger. Example: 100 > 99

flashcards.front: When comparing two numbers with the same number of digits, how do you determine which is larger?
flashcards.back: Compare digits from left to right, starting with the highest place value. The number with the larger digit in the highest place is larger.
